title: Join Method
description: Convert an array of strings into a single string separated by hyphens.
problemStatement:
From List to String! Given the array `["a", "b", "c"]`, use the `.join` method to create a single string where each letter is separated by a hyphen `-`.

**Requirement:** Print the final string to the console.
hints: The `.join` method takes an optional argument for the separator string.
